emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: RE: Sample ISDA Tana, would you please e-mail a sample ISDA to Mr. Ray Cunningham of Exxon and let me know when you've done so. Thanks again John Forwarded by John Malowney/HOU/ECT on 08/23/2000 10:26 AM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. To: ray.cunningham@exxon.com

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: RE: Sample ISDA Tana, would you please e-mail a sample ISDA to Mr. Ray Cunningham of Exxon and let me know when you've done so. Thanks again John Forwarded by John Malowney/HOU/ECT on 08/23/2000 10:26 AM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. To: ray.cunningham@exxon.com

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: John, Sorry about taking so long to get back to you on this. Re: sample master agreements...we recently had a group meeting where we were discouraged to send out sample masters. What appears to be happening is that a customer gets a sample master w/no credit, and then when we finally send them a real master w/credit, they are somewhat hacked off because the end up being incredibly longer once credit is added. If possible, can we not talk to Credit about sending them a real master? Let me know your thinking... John Malowney 08/23/2000 10:20 AM

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: John, Sorry about taking so long to get back to you on this. Re: sample master agreements...we recently had a group meeting where we were discouraged to send out sample masters. What appears to be happening is that a customer gets a sample master w/no credit, and then when we finally send them a real master w/credit, they are somewhat hacked off because the end up being incredibly longer once credit is added. If possible, can we not talk to Credit about sending them a real master? Let me know your thinking... John Malowney 08/23/2000 10:20 AM

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: I'll get back to you. Thanks, John To: ray.cunningham@exxon.com

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA

emails.subject: RE: Sample ISDA
emails.body: Tana, FYI I put the heat on them to see if they were truly interested in transacting and they are not at this time so let's hold off. Thanks, John To: ray.cunningham@exxon.com
